groups.group_name: Multi-Factor Authentication Not Enforced for IAM Principals
groups.rationale: Both findings address the same security control of enforcing MFA across IAM identities to prevent unauthorized access.
Both findings expose critical resources to the public internet, sharing the same attack vector of unrestricted network access.
Both findings address CloudTrail logging completeness and integrity, essential for audit trail reliability.

groups.group_name: EC2 Instance Metadata Service Not Using IMDSv2
groups.rationale: Standalone - distinct EC2 metadata security issue with unique remediation requirements.

groups.group_name: RDS Instance Encryption at Rest Not Enabled
groups.rationale: Standalone - distinct data protection issue for RDS storage encryption with no related checks in this scan.
All findings relate to S3 bucket security controls including access restrictions, encryption, and immutability protections.

groups.group_name: Centralized Security Monitoring Not Fully Enabled
groups.rationale: All findings relate to enabling comprehensive visibility and centralized monitoring across AWS environments.

groups.group_name: IAM Access Key Rotation Policy Not Enforced
groups.rationale: Standalone - distinct credential lifecycle management issue separate from MFA enforcement.
